top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2010 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ds.position;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2010 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ds.position;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2010 AND r.name LIKE '%Singapore%'
ORDER BY ds.positionText;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2010 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ds.position;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2010 AND r.name LIKE '%Singapore%'
ORDER BY ds.positionText;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2010 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY ds.position;
